configurations.name: backstage-frontend
runtimeArgs: cd backstage && npx yarn --ignore-engines install && npx yarn --ignore-engines workspace app start

configurations.name: backstage-backend
runtimeArgs: cd backstage && npx yarn --ignore-engines install && npx yarn --ignore-engines workspace backend start

configurations.name: backstage-dev
runtimeArgs: cd backstage && npx yarn --ignore-engines install && npx yarn --ignore-engines --ignore-engines dev

configurations.name: mcp-server
runtimeArgs: cd mcp-server && npm install && node index.js
